title: hieracium karelorum
intro: Hieracium karelorum, also known as Karelian hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, particularly in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Hieracium karelorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
